title: AcceldataCheckComponent
description: Trigger an Acceldata rule execution on demand and surface results as a Dagster asset check.

asset_key.description: Asset key to attach this check to (e.g. 'warehouse/orders')

api_url_env_var.description: Env var with Acceldata API base URL (e.g. https://mycompany.acceldata.io)

api_token_env_var.description: Env var with Acceldata API token

rule_id.description: ID of the Acceldata DQ rule to execute. Find in Acceldata UI: Rules → Rule Details → ID.

timeout_seconds.description: Max seconds to wait for rule execution

severity.description: Dagster asset check severity when the rule fails
